---
title: "How reactive is water at the nanoscale and how to control it?"
author: ["Xavier R. Advincula","Yair Litman","Kara D. Fong","William C. Witt","Christoph Schran", "Angelos Michaelides"]
date: 2026-04-14
publication: "Sci. Adv (2026)"
categories: ["aqueous_interfaces"]
url_source: https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.13034v1
url_preprint:
journ: "Sci. Adv."
issue: 
page: "(accepted)"
year: 2026
image: featured.jpg
pub_number: 35
---
